query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "active learners as efficient prp rerankers" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core mechanism (using LLMs for text reranking) and addresses the specific dependent variable (reranking performance) within the same domain (information retrieval with LLMs), even though it proposes a different specific technique (query-dependent PEFT) than the user's "Active Learners" approach. It serves as essential related work for a literature review on LLM-based reranking strategies.
